Name: Rail Corridor
Effect: Activated (2 Scrap): Move one of your units from any location to this one immediately.
Flavor: The rails don't care who laid them.

Name: Knowledge Cache
Effect: Activated (1 Action): Draw one Reactive card.
Flavor: Someone was storing things here they didn't want found.

Name: Fortified Ruins
Effect: Passive: Contesting units cannot benefit from chip bonuses during contests at this location.
Flavor: The old world built things to last. Some of them still do.

Name: Staging Ground
Effect: Activated (free, once per turn): A unit moving from this location may move one additional hex.

Name: Blacksite
Effect: Activated (1 Action): Choose one chip installed on an enemy unit or location anywhere on the board. Disable it until the start of your next turn.
Flavor: Whatever was happening here it wasn't in any public record.

Name: Scrapyard
Effect: Activated (2 Scrap): Remove one chip from an enemy unit at this location and add it to the Market Row.
Flavor: One faction's loss is everyone's opportunity.
